§6Fullerene§f

§aVibrant magenta carbon allotrope — the building block of crystalline fullerite and end-game materials!§f

Fullerene is an allotrope of carbon that appears as a vibrant magenta powder. It is produced by processing §bFullerene Solution§f in the §bSILEX§f with the FEL emitting in the visible light spectrum. Combined with BTX in the Ore Acidizer, it forms Crystalline Fullerite — a critical end-game material.

§6Production§f:
§b• SILEX§f: Fullerene Solution + BiSmUTh Laser Crystal @ ≥1.0× focus → §e1×§f Fullerene.
§b• Fullerene Solution§f (Industrial Mixer): §e500mB§f HPS + Fine Soot → §e250mB§f Fullerene Solution.

§6Uses§f:
§b• Crystalline Fullerite§f (Ore Acidizer): §e4×§f Fullerene + §e1,000mB§f BTX → §e1×§f Crystalline Fullerite. This is the primary use — Crystalline Fullerite gates access to the Pyrolysis Oven, Quantum Batteries, and end-game machinery.
§b• Dye§f: Fullerene can be used as a generic magenta dye in vanilla and modded recipes.

§eTip§f: The Fullerene production chain is: HPS → Fullerene Solution (Industrial Mixer) → Fullerene (SILEX). This makes §bHPS§f and §bBTX§f the two critical prerequisites. Do not skip this chain — Crystalline Fullerite is required for the §bPyrolysis Oven§f and all subsequent end-game progression!
